user.title: Gatekeeper HA
user.description:
Configure the guest access portal.

- **Guest page port**: Port for the standalone guest web interface (default: {port})
- **Default expiry hours**: How long new guest tokens last by default (default: {expiry})

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Gatekeeper HA is allowed.

data.disable_automations_on_mode: Disable automations when guest mode activates
data.disable_scripts_on_mode: Disable scripts when guest mode activates
data.disable_scenes_on_mode: Disable scenes when guest mode activates
data.apply_safe_states: Apply safe states (lock doors, turn off switches) in guest mode
data.wifi_ssid: WiFi network name (shown on guest page)

create_token.name: Create guest token
create_token.description: Generate a time-limited access token for a guest.

revoke_token.name: Revoke guest token
revoke_token.description: Immediately invalidate a guest access token.

activate_mode.name: Activate guest mode
activate_mode.description: Enable guest mode — disable selected automations/scripts/scenes and set safe states.

deactivate_mode.name: Deactivate guest mode
deactivate_mode.description: Disable guest mode — restore automations/scripts/scenes and revoke all tokens.

get_tokens.name: Get active tokens
get_tokens.description: List all currently active guest tokens.

get_guest_url.name: Get guest URL
get_guest_url.description: Return the current guest page URL for QR generation.
